blocks.text: Barcelona need a miracle: four goals down at Camp Nou tonight
Trailing 0-4 from the first leg, Barça would need the greatest Copa del Rey comeback ever staged. For Atlético, Camp Nou is a victory lap — not a battle.

blocks.label: ⭐ Must-Watch Ahead
items: ⚽ Wed 21:00 — Copa del Rey Basque derby: Athletic Club must overturn Real Sociedad's 1-0 aggregate lead at Reale Arena
⛳ Thu 06:00 — Arnold Palmer Invitational: Hovland at Bay Hill, one of PGA Tour's premier Signature Events
🏎️ Fri 02:30 — Australian Grand Prix: F1 2025 season kicks off, first championship points on the board
🚴 Sat 12:00 — Strade Bianche: Abrahamsen and Hoelgaard chase glory on Tuscany's iconic gravel roads
